name: style-transfer
description: Transfer the style of one image to another

height.description: Height of the output image (ignored if structure image given)
height.title: Height

model.description: Model to use for the generation
model.title: model

negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want to see in your image
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

output_quality.description: Quality of the output images, from 0 to 100. 100 is best quality, 0 is lowest quality.
output_quality.title: Output Quality

seed.description: Set a seed for reproducibility. Random by default.
seed.title: Seed

structure_denoising_strength.description: How much of the original image (and colors) to preserve (0 is all, 1 is none, 0.65 is a good balance)
structure_denoising_strength.title: Structure Denoising Strength

structure_image.description: An optional image to copy structure from. Output images will use the same aspect ratio.
structure_image.title: Structure Image

style_image.description: Copy the style from this image
style_image.title: Style Image

width.description: Width of the output image (ignored if structure image given)
width.title: Width
